prompts.name: validate_lab_csv_with_evidence
prompts.title: Validate Lab CSV With Evidence
prompts.description: Ask OJTFlow to validate lab CSV data, retrieve trusted standards evidence, and explain issues without clinical treatment advice.

prompts.name: profile_fhir_resource
prompts.title: Profile FHIR-like Resource
prompts.description: Profile FHIR-like JSON and identify resource type, required shape, schema evidence, and Graph-NER handoff context.

prompts.name: find_ucum_evidence
prompts.title: Find UCUM Evidence
prompts.description: Search trusted terminology evidence for a unit or unit-related validation issue.
prompts.template: Find trusted UCUM/unit evidence for {{unit}}. Explain whether the unit is present, missing, or suspicious for healthcare lab validation. Include source IDs, matched terms, support matrix status, and gaps.

arguments.name: unit
arguments.description: Unit text or unit issue to investigate.

prompts.name: inspect_pending_reviews
prompts.title: Inspect Pending Reviews
prompts.description: List human review work and summarize what an operator should inspect next.
prompts.template: List workflows awaiting human review with status {{review_status}}. Summarize IDs, issue counts, evidence availability, and next operator actions. Do not approve or reject reviews.

prompts.name: summarize_workflow
prompts.title: Summarize Workflow
prompts.description: Summarize one workflow with status, validation issues, evidence, review state, and next actions.
prompts.template: Summarize workflow {{workflow_id}} for an operator. Include current status, completed steps, validation issue categories, evidence support, review gate state, output readiness, and next actions.

prompts.name: prepare_export_review
prompts.title: Prepare Export Review
prompts.description: Prepare a human-readable export readiness review before downstream handoff.
prompts.template: Prepare an export readiness review for workflow {{workflow_id}}. Check validation state, evidence support, review decision, PHI/sensitive data warnings, and limitations. Do not export or mutate data.

arguments.name: workflow_id
arguments.description: Workflow ID to inspect before export.
